rationale: Educ. Code §33.158 governs donations to the Communities In Schools program. It has no operative relationship to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict arises.
quote: The agency may accept a donation of services or money or other property that the agency determines furthers the lawful objectives of the agency in connection with the Communities In Schools program.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no cross-reference or fiscal linkage exists on the face of this statute.
